allow: Bash(git commit -m 'Default OG/SEO fallbacks in WebflowPage layout *)

Bash(node -e "const r=require\('/tmp/lh-mobile.json'\); console.log\('Performance:', Math.round\(r.categories.performance.score*100\)\); console.log\('Accessibility:', Math.round\(r.categories.accessibility.score*100\)\); console.log\('Best Practices:', Math.round\(r.categories['best-practices'].score*100\)\); console.log\('SEO:', Math.round\(r.categories.seo.score*100\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const r=require\('/tmp/lh-desktop.json'\); console.log\('Performance:', Math.round\(r.categories.performance.score*100\)\); console.log\('Accessibility:', Math.round\(r.categories.accessibility.score*100\)\); console.log\('Best Practices:', Math.round\(r.categories['best-practices'].score*100\)\); console.log\('SEO:', Math.round\(r.categories.seo.score*100\)\);")
